'''patotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumatogram|pneumatogram]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumatogram|pneumatogram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| patotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pætetheth|pætetheth]] || [[word:pætethej|pætethej]] || [[word:pætethesh|pætethesh]] || [[word:pætethe|pætethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:patotothoth|patotothoth]] || [[word:patotothoj|patotothoj]] || [[word:patotothosh|patotothosh]] || [[word:patototho|patototho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:patothoth|patothoth]] || [[word:patothoj|patothoj]] || [[word:patothosh|patothosh]] || [[word:patotho|patotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:patofthoth|patofthoth]] || [[word:patofthoj|patofthoj]] || [[word:patofthosh|patofthosh]] || [[word:patofthof|patofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:patothotho|patothotho]] || [[word:patothojo|patothojo]] || [[word:patothosho|patothosho]] || [[word:patothoko|patothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:patothoth|patothoth]] || [[word:patothoj|patothoj]] || [[word:patothosh|patothosh]] || [[word:patotho|patotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:patothothol|patothothol]] || [[word:patothojol|patothojol]] || [[word:patothoshol|patothoshol]] || [[word:patothokol|patothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:patothothotho|patothothotho]] || [[word:patothojojo|patothojojo]] || [[word:patothoshosho|patothoshosho]] || [[word:patothoko|patothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:patothothon|patothothon]] || [[word:patothojon|patothojon]] || [[word:patothoshon|patothoshon]] || [[word:patothokon|patothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:patothothoro|patothothoro]] || [[word:patothojoro|patothojoro]] || [[word:patothoshoro|patothoshoro]] || [[word:patothokoro|patothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
